name: Repair Patch
description: Restores 25 Crawler Hull HP. Usable during dungeon navigation.

name: Vital Shard
description: Fully restores the most damaged Glyph's HP. Usable between battles.

name: Ward Charm
description: Grants one Glyph immunity to the next status effect applied in the next battle.

name: Echo Lure
description: Increases capture probability by +25% for the next battle. Consumed whether or not a capture occurs.

name: Rift Beacon
description: Reveals all rooms on the current floor. Like a free full-floor scan.

name: Revival Core
description: Revives a KO'd Glyph with 50% HP. Usable between battles.

name: Affinity Prism
description: Boosts all attack damage by +50% in the next battle. Consumed when battle starts.

name: Hull Shield
description: Blocks the next hazard room's hull damage. Consumed on hazard entry.
